heading: Payments to ensure continuing availability of goods and services during the coronavirus emergency
label: 5548 Payments to ensure continuing availability of goods and services during the coronavirus emergency
notes: CodificationSection is from the Emergency Appropriations for Coronavirus Health Response and Agency Operations, which is div. B of the Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act or the CARES Act.
DefinitionFor definition of “coronavirus”, see , set out as a note under .section 23005 of Pub. L. 116–136section 162b of this title

children.heading: Authorization to make payments
children.label: a Authorization to make payments
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law and subject to subsection (b), during an emergency situation, the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives may make payments under contracts with vendors providing goods and services to the House in amounts and under terms and conditions other than those provided under the contract in order to ensure that those goods and services remain available to the House throughout the duration of the emergency.

children.heading: Approval required
children.label: 1 Approval required
children.text: The Chief Administrative Officer may not make payments under the authority of subsection (a) without the approval of the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Availability of appropriations
children.label: 2 Availability of appropriations
children.text: The authority of the Chief Administrative Officer to make payments under the authority of subsection (a) is subject to the availability of appropriations to make such payments.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: c Applicability
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2020 and each succeeding fiscal year.
